sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sabbath mangngilh kei un, Pasian thupha piaksa,
Apha a nuam bel ni hi, ni sagih kal
sungah;
Gimna pan tawldam hong pia, lungnopna hong gen hi,
Vantung melhoihna pha tawh, a vang hong
tangsuk hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Dawn ni, dawn ni, dawn denden ni,
Thupha Sabbath ni;
Dawn ni,
dawn ni, dawn denden ni,
Thupha Sabbath ni.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sabbath siangtho sak un, bia un Amah
tuni’n,
A nungzuite’ kiangah ci, “Hinna lampi ka hi;”
Hih leitungah hong
Honpa, kiniamkhiatin zui leng,
Nuntakna tui hong pia ding, a tawntunga luang den.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A
nuam a siangtho ni! Zang ni ahun manpha,
Lawmpha bel Jesuh’ tungah, Sak ni lungdamna
la;
Midik hong it Honpa aw, Nangmah Na phabel hi,
Mi teng tungah teng dingin, Na thuciamna pha hi!
